injuries.comment: Cirelli did not play in Saturday's (Nov. 8) game versus the Capitals.
The Lightning said that is Holmberg is day-to-day after missing Tuesday's (Nov. 11) practice, per Benjamin Pierce of the team's official site.
The Lightning said on Tuesday (Nov. 11) that Hedman is day-to-day with an undisclosed injury.

Crozier has missed the Lightning's last two games due to injury but is considered day-to-day ahead of Wednesday's (Nov. 12) contest versus the Rangers, as per Benjamin Pierce of the Lightning's official site.
